metadata.title: Seedance AI Generator - Text to Motion Video
metadata.description: Create Seedance AI videos from text or images. Build dance, character, and social-ready motion scenes with prompt-controlled movement and aspect ratios.
metadata.imageAlt: SeeAI Dance Generator - Social Share Image

workspace.title: Seedance AI Generator
workspace.description: Create dynamic AI video concepts from text or image direction with expressive movement, character continuity, and polished short-form pacing.
workspace.defaultPrompt: Create a dynamic Seedance AI video: a dancer moves through a sunlit loft, smooth full-body motion, camera arcs around the subject, fabric movement, coherent timing, cinematic music-video style.

uploadSlots.label: Upload reference image
uploadSlots.description: Optional character, pose, outfit, or scene reference for image-to-video motion.

workspace.readyText: Your Seedance motion prompt and settings are ready.

showcase.title: Seedance motion prompt examples
showcase.description: Seedance-style prompts work best when they describe body motion, camera movement, rhythm, setting, and character continuity.

items.title: Dance Reel
items.description: Full-body movement for short-form music video clips.
items.prompt: A dancer performs in a sunlit loft, smooth full-body motion, camera arcs around the subject, fabric movement, cinematic music-video lighting.

items.title: Character Motion
items.description: Consistent subject movement from an image reference.
items.prompt: Animate this character walking through a city street, stable outfit and face, natural arm movement, camera tracking from the front, realistic timing.

items.title: Sports Action
items.description: Energetic motion with clear physical action.
items.prompt: A basketball player spins and dunks in slow motion, dynamic camera push-in, stadium light, clear body mechanics, high-energy sports edit.

items.title: Fashion Movement
items.prompt: A model turns in a long coat, fabric flowing naturally, runway-style camera pan, soft studio light, polished fashion campaign video.

what.title: Motion-first AI videos with character and camera continuity
what.description: Seedance search intent is different from generic video generation. Users want stronger movement, character consistency, image-to-video control, and camera choreography that keeps the subject believable across the clip.

items.title: Dance and movement clips
items.description: Create full-body motion, dance scenes, sports action, music-video shots, and expressive short-form clips where body mechanics and timing are the main point.

items.title: Image-to-video animation
items.description: Turn a reference image into character movement or scene motion while using the prompt to protect outfit, pose, face, and environment details.

items.title: Multi-shot concepts
items.description: Plan video scenes with consistent character identity, style, physical movement, and camera logic before expanding into more complex edits or multi-shot concepts.

how.title: How to use Seedance AI
how.description: The most useful Seedance prompts describe the mechanics of movement, not just the mood. A strong prompt names the subject, action, pacing, camera path, and how the body relates to the scene.

steps.title: Choose text or image input
steps.description: Use text when exploring a new motion idea, or upload an image when character identity, outfit, pose, product, or environment should guide the generated movement.

steps.title: Describe body motion
steps.description: Mention walking, turning, dancing, jumping, hand gestures, fabric movement, object interaction, or camera choreography so the system has concrete motion to follow.

steps.title: Check continuity
steps.description: Review character consistency, limb placement, face stability, timing, camera path, and whether the motion looks physically plausible before exporting.

features.title: Seedance controls for dynamic video quality
features.description: Helpful Seedance content should answer the questions users compare across tools: text-to-video versus image-to-video, motion consistency, character continuity, and camera movement.

items.title: Text-to-video
items.description: Generate motion scenes from a written prompt when you need open-ended choreography, action, camera direction, or a new environment.

items.title: Image-to-video
items.description: Animate a reference character, pose, outfit, product, or scene when the output needs to preserve a recognizable starting point.

items.title: Motion direction
items.description: Guide dance, walking, turning, sports movement, character action, camera arcs, push-ins, pans, and pacing with concrete verbs.

items.title: Social formats
items.description: Create vertical, square, and landscape concepts while checking that full-body movement, important gestures, and subject framing stay visible.

useCases.title: Where Seedance AI works best
useCases.description: Use Seedance-style generation when the motion itself carries the story. These examples focus on action, body mechanics, and continuity rather than static image enhancement.

items.title: Dance videos
items.description: Create TikTok-style movement, choreography, music-video concepts, and performance tests where the viewer judges the output by body motion and rhythm.

items.title: Character animation
items.description: Move a character reference through walking, posing, reacting, dancing, or object interaction while watching for face and outfit consistency.

items.title: Fashion and sports
items.description: Generate fashion turns, fabric movement, sports actions, fitness clips, and energetic camera moves where physical timing needs to feel coherent.

items.title: Brand content
items.description: Draft high-energy social ads, teasers, lifestyle scenes, and motion tests before investing in polished editing, captions, or campaign variations.

value.title: Why Seedance pages should focus on motion
value.description: Users searching Seedance usually care about whether movement stays coherent. The page should answer that quality question directly with practical prompt and review guidance.

points.title: Movement clarity
points.description: Strong prompts describe visible actions, physical timing, body direction, and the relationship between the subject and camera, not only aesthetic adjectives.

points.title: Character continuity
points.description: Reference images and focused prompts help keep subjects recognizable, but creators still need to review face, outfit, and limb continuity after generation.

points.title: Camera choreography
points.description: Camera arcs, pans, tracking shots, and push-ins can make simple movement feel cinematic when they support the action instead of fighting it.

related.title: More AI video tools
related.description: Use these adjacent pages when you need cinematic audio, faster short clips, talking videos, or location effects.

faq.title: Seedance AI Generator FAQ
faq.description: Answers for users comparing Seedance text-to-video, image-to-video, dance motion, output quality, and prompt strategy.

items.question: What is Seedance AI?
items.answer: Seedance AI is a video generation workflow associated with dynamic text-to-video and image-to-video creation. It is often used for motion-heavy clips such as dance, character action, fashion movement, and short social videos.

items.question: Can Seedance create videos from images?
items.answer: Seedance-style workflows can use image references to guide character identity, pose, outfit, or scene. A clear image plus a motion prompt usually works better than an image alone.

items.question: Is Seedance good for dance videos?
items.answer: Yes. It is especially relevant for dance and body-motion prompts because users can describe choreography, camera movement, rhythm, and full-body action.

items.question: What should I include in a Seedance prompt?
items.answer: Include the subject, exact motion, camera movement, environment, lighting, pacing, and whether the result should preserve identity from an uploaded image.

items.question: How do I avoid unnatural body movement?
items.answer: Keep the action simple, describe one main movement, avoid impossible poses, and use reference images with clear limbs, posture, and lighting.

items.question: Can Seedance make social media videos?
items.answer: Yes. Use 9:16 for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, and keep the first action visually obvious so the clip works as a short-form hook.

items.question: Does Seedance support multi-shot storytelling?
items.answer: Seedance-related search interest often includes multi-shot and continuity questions. For best results, describe each shot clearly and keep character details consistent.

items.question: Can I use Seedance AI videos commercially?
items.answer: Commercial use depends on platform terms and rights to the uploaded image, character likeness, music, brand assets, and prompts. Review usage rights before paid campaigns.

finalCta.title: Create a Seedance AI video
finalCta.description: Upload a reference image or write a motion-first prompt, then generate a dynamic video concept with coherent action and social-ready framing.
